findings.problem: The hold-disarmed path publishes `actuators_armed=true`, so a lifecycle-owned disarmed state is reported as armed in runtime observation and diagnostics.
findings.evidence: /home/madejuele/projects/2K0300/new/code/runtime/control_loop.cpp:511-519 routes `hold_disarmed=true` through `platform_.motor->Disable(...)`, which is the intentional disarmed path. /home/madejuele/projects/2K0300/new/code/runtime/control_decision.cpp:53-69 then assigns `kHeldDisarmedApplied` but still computes `observation.actuators_armed = !inputs.apply_suppressed_by_profile && inputs.apply_ok && !inputs.command.emergency_stop;`, which evaluates true for the hold-disarmed inputs passed from control_loop (`apply_ok=true`, `apply_suppressed_by_profile=false`, `command={0,0,false}`, `hold_disarmed=true`). /home/madejuele/projects/2K0300/new/code/runtime/control_loop.cpp:521-538 publishes that observation into `state_.control_observation` and `state_.actuators_armed`, and /home/madejuele/projects/2K0300/new/code/runtime/control_loop.cpp:293-304 emits `control.arm.transition` from the same incorrect state. A direct probe compiled against the scoped implementation produced `2 1 1 1` for a hold-disarmed cycle, meaning `kHeldDisarmedApplied`, `hold_disarmed=true`, `actuators_armed=true`, and `arming_transition=true`. This conflicts with /home/madejuele/projects/2K0300/openspec/changes/implement-phase-b-motion-lifecycle/specs/phase-b-motion-lifecycle/spec.md:16-27 and /home/madejuele/projects/2K0300/openspec/changes/implement-phase-b-motion-lifecycle/specs/tc264-to-true-ls2k0300-adapter-layer/spec.md:16-36, which require hold-disarmed suppression to stay distinct while actuator-arming/apply outcomes remain accurately reviewable.
findings.recommendation: Make the published arming state false whenever the runtime takes the hold-disarmed disable path, then propagate that corrected state through `ControlCycleObservation`, `state_.actuators_armed`, and `control.arm.transition` diagnostics. The repair should ensure hold-disarmed remains a separate apply outcome without reporting that the actuators stayed armed.
